name: libstrictures-perl
title: libstrictures-perl
summary: Perl module to turn on strict and make all warnings fatal
description:
Perl module to turn on strict and make all warnings fatal
strictures turns on strict and makes all warnings fatal. If run within test
cases from VCS checkouts, it will also cause bareword filehandles, indirect
object syntax and multidimensional array emulation to raise a fatal error. To
actually turn on these checks and stop strictures to complain about missing
modules, the recommended packages libbareword-filehandles-perl,
libindirect-perl and libmultidimensional-perl need to be installed.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libstrictures-perl because Perl module to turn on strict and make all warnings fatal.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libstrictures-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libstrictures-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libstrictures-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
